TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Umalak tunux / Mangal tunux - Boxin Gilang - Kari Sejiq Truku ( ŚáļŤćČ - śěóšĽĀŚ∑Ě Boxin Gilang - Ť™ěŤ®Ä: Kari Sejiq Truku) = Mnuda pnqqihun uri ka rdrudan cbiyaw, mray so rudan cbiyaw Sediq minjoku mi mntna ka Sejiq Truku wa mniq kareyngko pa mnuda pnqqihun uri, ana so balay niqan pnluban tndadal niya, mntna so Sediq Toda mi Sejiq Truku mi Seediq Tgdaya uri u ppwalak tunux uri. Mray so ita mi Sediq wa mniq Kareyngko uri u tndadal ta kana. Mniq knxalan ni, nasi uxay balay snhiyi ta Bukung Baraw mi, smluhay kari Bukung daw, uka ana manu, wana msdurux muda lhbun ta ka smdhu onluban ta Sediq minkoku mi sediq minjoku icil. So ni ka qnbhangan kari rudan cbiyaw, ppqihun psipaq ka rudan cbiyaw pa, ppwaluk tunux, qyanun dha kcka rpun ka tunux,pqdalan dha idaw macu, nasi ini dha spkan idaw da u, uxay su mpangal tunux ka umalak nduray, nasi ou balay ka unlakan tunux cida, sediq pa ddilun dha msupu rmweri ka tunux qnriyan wasaw.
S.PHON: = umalak tunux / maŇčal tunux - boxin gilaŇč - ka…ĺi s…ô…üiq t…ĺuku ( ** - *** boxin gilaŇč - **: ka…ĺi s…ô…üiq t…ĺuku) = mnuda pnqqińßun u…ĺi ka …ĺd…ĺudan ¶bijaw, m…ĺaj so …ĺudan ¶bijaw s…ôdiq min…üoku mi mntna ka s…ô…üiq t…ĺuku wa mniq ka…ĺ…ôŇčko pa mnuda pnqqińßun u…ĺi, ana so balaj niqan pnluban tndadal nija, mntna so s…ôdiq toda mi s…ô…üiq t…ĺuku mi s…ô…ôdiq tgdaja u…ĺi u ppwalak tunux u…ĺi. m…ĺaj so ita mi s…ôdiq wa mniq ka…ĺ…ôŇčko u…ĺi u tndadal ta kana. mniq knxalan ni, nasi uxaj balaj snńßiji ta bukuŇč ba…ĺaw mi, smluńßaj ka…ĺi bukuŇč daw, uka ana manu, wana msdu…ĺux muda lńßbun ta ka smdńßu onluban ta s…ôdiq minkoku mi s…ôdiq min…üoku i ¶il. so ni ka qnbńßaŇčan ka…ĺi …ĺudan ¶bijaw, ppqińßun psipaq ka …ĺudan ¶bijaw pa, ppwaluk tunux, qjanun dńßa k ¶ka …ĺpun ka tunux,pqdalan dńßa idaw ma ¶u, nasi ini dńßa spkan idaw da u, uxaj su mpaŇčal tunux ka umalak ndu…ĺaj, nasi ou balaj ka unlakan tunux ¶ida, s…ôdiq pa ddilun dńßa msupu …ĺmw…ô…ĺi ka tunux qn…ĺijan wasaw.
S.FORM: = Umalak tunux / Mangal tunux - Boxin Gilang - Kari Sejiq Truku ( ŚáļŤćČ - śěóšĽĀŚ∑Ě Boxin Gilang - Ť™ěŤ®Ä: Kari Sejiq Truku) = Mnuda pnqqihun uri ka rdrudan cbiyaw, mray so rudan cbiyaw Sediq minjoku mi mntna ka Sejiq Truku wa mniq kareyngko pa mnuda pnqqihun uri, ana so balay niqan pnluban tndadal niya, mntna so Sediq Toda mi Sejiq Truku mi Seediq Tgdaya uri u ppwalak tunux uri. Mray so ita mi Sediq wa mniq Kareyngko uri u tndadal ta kana. Mniq knxalan ni, nasi uxay balay snhiyi ta Bukung Baraw mi, smluhay kari Bukung daw, uka ana manu, wana msdurux muda lhbun ta ka smdhu onluban ta Sediq minkoku mi sediq minjoku icil. So ni ka qnbhangan kari rudan cbiyaw, ppqihun psipaq ka rudan cbiyaw pa, ppwaluk tunux, qyanun dha kcka rpun ka tunux,pqdalan dha idaw macu, nasi ini dha spkan idaw da u, uxay su mpangal tunux ka umalak nduray, nasi ou balay ka unlakan tunux cida, sediq pa ddilun dha msupu rmweri ka tunux qnriyan wasaw.
S.PHON: = umalak tunux / maŇčal tunux - boxin gilaŇč - ka…ĺi s…ô…üiq t…ĺuku ( ** - *** boxin gilaŇč - **: ka…ĺi s…ô…üiq t…ĺuku) = mnuda pnqqińßun u…ĺi ka …ĺd…ĺudan ¶bijaw, m…ĺaj so …ĺudan ¶bijaw s…ôdiq min…üoku mi mntna ka s…ô…üiq t…ĺuku wa mniq ka…ĺ…ôŇčko pa mnuda pnqqińßun u…ĺi, ana so balaj niqan pnluban tndadal nija, mntna so s…ôdiq toda mi s…ô…üiq t…ĺuku mi s…ô…ôdiq tgdaja u…ĺi u ppwalak tunux u…ĺi. m…ĺaj so ita mi s…ôdiq wa mniq ka…ĺ…ôŇčko u…ĺi u tndadal ta kana. mniq knxalan ni, nasi uxaj balaj snńßiji ta bukuŇč ba…ĺaw mi, smluńßaj ka…ĺi bukuŇč daw, uka ana manu, wana msdu…ĺux muda lńßbun ta ka smdńßu onluban ta s…ôdiq minkoku mi s…ôdiq min…üoku i ¶il. so ni ka qnbńßaŇčan ka…ĺi …ĺudan ¶bijaw, ppqińßun psipaq ka …ĺudan ¶bijaw pa, ppwaluk tunux, qjanun dńßa k ¶ka …ĺpun ka tunux,pqdalan dńßa idaw ma ¶u, nasi ini dńßa spkan idaw da u, uxaj su mpaŇčal tunux ka umalak ndu…ĺaj, nasi ou balaj ka unlakan tunux ¶ida, s…ôdiq pa ddilun dńßa msupu …ĺmw…ô…ĺi ka tunux qn…ĺijan wasaw.
